narrative:
South Range Local Sd (Mahoning) school district has 5,067 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a modest Republican lean of 4.8 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -8.9% D−R vs -2.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
